form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.48) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.48) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when he was slow out over 516m at Dubbo. Prior to that won easily by 7 lengths at Dubbo (29.35) beating Valedictorian in a Grade 4/5 on March 14. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by a nose at Richmond over 401m (22.72) beating Supreme Lady in Grade 4/5 on March 25. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by a nose at Richmond over 401m (22.72) beating Supreme Lady in Grade 4/5 on March 25. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 457m at Temora. That followed a win two back in 19.63 beating Killer Forge over 350m at Goulburn. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 457m at Temora. That followed a win two back in 19.63 beating Killer Forge over 350m at Goulburn. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at Goulburn over 440m (24.92) beating Fine Shine in Grade 4/5 on March 27. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by one length at Goulburn over 440m (24.92) beating Fine Shine in Grade 4/5 on March 27. Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Finished sixth last start at Dubbo but prior to that had been racing consistently. Drawn out wide and looks tested this line up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished sixth last start at Dubbo but prior to that had been racing consistently. Drawn out wide and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 6 lengths over 515m at Gosford in a handy 29.42, beating Real Bonnie. Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 6 lengths over 515m at Gosford in a handy 29.42, beating Real Bonnie. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Richmond to win by 0.8 lengths in 29.75, beating Winsome Storm. Last start finished last in a NG on March 28 over 520m at this track behind Taormina beaten 8 lengths (30.11). Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Richmond to win by 0.8 lengths in 29.75, beating Winsome Storm. Last start finished last in a NG on March 28 over 520m at this track behind Taormina beaten 8 lengths (30.11). Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide rounding the turn out of the front straight.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 7th over 520m at Richmond beaten 11 lengths (30.74) behind Raymar Shame in a Grade 5 on April 1. Has a strong 29.85 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 7th over 630m at Nowra beaten 14 lengths (37.40) behind Eureka Mac in a Grade 5 on March 19. Racing well and has to be included.
